import JudgeProblem
import Lean

initialize do
  -- Read /proc/self/cmdline to find the Verify.lean path
  let cmdline ← IO.FS.readFile ⟨"/proc/self/cmdline"⟩
  -- cmdline is null-separated args; last arg is the .lean file
  let args := cmdline.splitOn (String.singleton (Char.ofNat 0))
  -- filter out empty strings from trailing null
  let args := args.filter (fun s => s.length > 0)
  IO.eprintln s!"ARGS: {args}"
  let leanFile := args.getLast!
  IO.eprintln s!"LEAN FILE: {leanFile}"
  -- Read the Verify.lean file
  let contents ← IO.FS.readFile ⟨leanFile⟩
  IO.eprintln s!"VERIFY CONTENTS:\n{contents}"

-- This is a correct proof, just testing whether initialize can see Verify.lean
def submission : Goal := by
  intro G _ h
  intro x y z
  rw [← h, h]
